phase3_findings.description: Clean: assertions genuinely guard the two-sided calibration contract; regenerated manifests match sources; consumer prose repo-agnostic; suite green.

T5 tools:-line capture (grep -E '^tools:[[:space:]]' | head -1) fails open: an empty capture makes the omission and byte-identity assertions pass vacuously, so a frontmatter reformat re-introducing KillShell/BashOutput could ship green.
Clean: run.sh comments, growth-artifact byte deltas (+703/+947/+1637), changeset prose, and agent/phase-2 prose all accurate against HEAD.

The 'state its operands and counting rule inline' sub-clause of AC1/AC2 was unpinned (deletable while the core-phrase pin still passed). The phase-2 workpad-recording tail is unpinned but is a disclosed accepted residual.

notes: Inline review-and-fix on a prose+test-pin diff (issue #628).
